dashboard.label: SSH Detector - Attack Analysis
dashboard.description: Detailed analysis of SSH brute-force attacks

search.query: index=ssh_security sourcetype=sshd_auth action=failed | stats count by src_ip | sort - count | head 50
index=ssh_security sourcetype=sshd_auth action=failed | where src_ip="$src_ip$" OR "$src_ip$"="*" | timechart span=1m count
index=ssh_security sourcetype=sshd_auth action=failed | eval hour=strftime(_time, "%H") | stats count by hour | sort hour

index=ssh_security sourcetype=sshd_auth | stats count, min(_time) as first_attack, max(_time) as last_attack, values(user) as targets, dc(user) as unique_users by src_ip | where count > 5 | eval duration=round((last_attack-first_attack)/60, 2) | eval rate=round(count/duration, 2) | sort - count | head 50

table.fields: src_ip, count, duration, rate, unique_users, targets

search.query: index=ssh_security sourcetype=sshd_auth action=failed | stats count by user, src_ip | sort - count | head 100

index=ssh_security sourcetype=sshd_auth | search action=failed OR action=success | sort 0 _time | streamstats window=20 current=f latest(action) as last_action, values(action) as actions, count as attempt_count by src_ip, user | search last_action=success AND attempt_count > 1 | table _time src_ip user attempt_count
index=ssh_security sourcetype=sshd_auth action=failed | rex field=_raw "method:\s+(?\w+)" | if(isnull(method), "unknown", method) as auth_method | stats count by auth_method
index=ssh_security sourcetype=sshd_auth | stats count by dest_ip | sort - count
